name: single-URL mode drives Stage 1 (extract) + Stage 2 (classify) and reports the segment count on stderr
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o03-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Rule alpha
prose alpha.

## Rule beta
prose beta.

## Rule gamma
prose gamma.
MD
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/src.md --target-namespace us-government --framework-id o03 --source-id o03src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out --dry-run 2>e.err; grep -q 'segments=3 rules_new=3' e.err && echo single-url-extracts-and-classifies 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
